use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and interfaces
Destructive action triggers with visual warning states
Ghost-style overlay buttons for toolbars and compact UI areas
ai_summary: A flexible button component from Ruixen.Ui featuring multiple variants including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, CVA for variant management, and includes focus-visible states, disabled states, and shadow effects for a polished, accessible button system.
